prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Identify all `package.json` files across your Node.js web stack repos that declare `cookie` as a direct runtime dependency (listed under `dependencies`, not `devDependencies`).
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the nodejs-web-stack fixture.
prd.seed_prompt: Identify all `package.json` files across your Node.js web stack repos that declare `cookie` as a direct runtime dependency (listed under `dependencies`, not `devDependencies`).
